news.title:
Seamec Ltd shares surged 7% after securing ₹410.7 cr vessel O&M order from ONGC.
Stock hit ₹1420, marking a 7.3% intraday rise, highest since Jan 29, 2023.
news.summary:
Seamec Ltd shares surged 7% after securing ₹410.7 cr vessel O&M order from ONGC.
Stock hit ₹1420, marking a 7.3% intraday rise, highest since Jan 29, 2023.

news.title:

ONGC gains from higher crude; target price raised to ₹240.
news.summary:

news.title:
ONGC and Oil India shares see double-digit gains, outperforming sector in 2026.
Iran-Israel crisis raises speculation on further upside for these stocks.
news.summary:
ONGC and Oil India shares see double-digit gains, outperforming sector in 2026.
Iran-Israel crisis raises speculation on further upside for these stocks.

news.title:
Macquarie retains Outperform on ONGC with ₹300 TP, cut ~3%, citing sustained production growth for re-rating.
Declines to stabilize by 2025; major production ramp-up in 2026; ~6% dividend yield supports outlook amid oil price volatility.
news.summary:
Macquarie retains Outperform on ONGC with ₹300 TP, cut ~3%, citing sustained production growth for re-rating.
Declines to stabilize by 2025; major production ramp-up in 2026; ~6% dividend yield supports outlook amid oil price volatility.

news.title: Macquarie sees a major re-rating trigger for ONGC unrelated to oil price rise.
news.summary: Macquarie sees a major re-rating trigger for ONGC unrelated to oil price rise.

news.title:
ONGC and OIL face pressure as Brent crude drops below $90/bbl after remarks by Trump.
Cipla recalls Lanreotide injection batches; govt investigates gas supply issues raised by restaurants.
news.summary:

news.title:
ONGC detected unusual bids of exactly ₹7,000/tonne in a 2018 cement tender.
India Cements responded wryly to ONGC's query on the bidding anomaly.

news.title:
Nifty 50 enters technical correction, down 10.1% from Jan 5 peak of 26,373.2 to 23,697 on Mar 9.
Wipro falls 26%, Jio Financial Services 24%, Asian Paints 23%. ONGC rises 16%, Bharat Electronics gains 9%.
news.summary:
Nifty 50 enters technical correction, down 10.1% from Jan 5 peak of 26,373.2 to 23,697 on Mar 9.
Wipro falls 26%, Jio Financial Services 24%, Asian Paints 23%. ONGC rises 16%, Bharat Electronics gains 9%.

news.summary:

news.title:
ONGC's subsidiary OPaL faces production disruptions at Dahej due to gas supplier force majeure amid West Asia conflict.
ONGC reported Q3FY26 net profit rise of 23% YoY to ₹11,946 crore; revenue stable at ₹1,67,423 crore.
news.summary:
ONGC's subsidiary OPaL faces production disruptions at Dahej due to gas supplier force majeure amid West Asia conflict.
ONGC reported Q3FY26 net profit rise of 23% YoY to ₹11,946 crore; revenue stable at ₹1,67,423 crore.

news.title:
ONGC Petro faces production and supply issues at Dahej plant due to total gaseous feed cutoff.
Restricted liquid feedstock supply further impacts operations at ONGC Petro's Dahej facility.
news.summary:
ONGC Petro faces production and supply issues at Dahej plant due to total gaseous feed cutoff.

news.title:
Sensex and Nifty opened higher amid diplomacy hopes; Sensex at 79,501.32 (+0.49%), Nifty at 24,607.95 (+0.52%) by 9:45 am.
Coal India (+2.83%), ONGC (+2.67%), Reliance (+2.33%) led gains; Max Healthcare (-1.32%), HCL Tech (-0.98%) faced declines.

news.title:
